title: EP Primer with Daniel E. Schott
titleLine: EP PRIMER WITH DANIEL E. SCHOTT—Live
blurb: A live EP Primer with Daniel E. Schott, a first-time Executive Producer — streaming right now on INTERDEPENDENT.
message: Back to our regularly scheduled programming
_help: CONTROL FILE for the interdependent.tv live takeover. Set active:true to GO LIVE (channel takes over within one poll, ~15s); set active:false to END the live and return every viewer to the standing schedule within ~15s (no site redeploy). Change playbackId to REPOINT to a different Mux live stream. Deploy just this file with: wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=interdependent-tv --branch=main
